# init(page:usage:)

**Initializer**

Creates a HID usage page from raw page and usage values.

## Declaration

```swift
init(page: UInt16, usage: UInt16?)
```

## Discussion

Unsupported cases are returned as [doc://com.apple.CoreHID/documentation/CoreHID/HIDUsage/generic(_:_:)].
